title: Online Marketing Manager (f/m/x) (Web & Performance focus)
required_skills: Strong analytical mindset with dashboard/data proficiency
matched_skills: Strong analytical mindset — Power BI certified (PL-300), dashboard design, data storytelling
B2B marketing experience (Intelligent Power Corp, GRG Banking)
A/B testing & experiment design (listed in CV skills)
KPI framework design and performance reporting
Campaign performance monitoring and ROI analytics
missing_skills: GA4 / Google Analytics 4 — not in candidate's toolset
Google Tag Manager (GTM) — not in candidate's toolset
SEO tools: SEMrush, Ahrefs — no evidence in CV
CMS platform experience (Sitecore, Adobe Experience Manager) — not present
Paid media management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads) — not evidenced
Corporate website management — no hands-on web ownership experience
Consent management platform (CMP) experience — not present
core_responsibilities: Monitor, analyze, and report on digital marketing performance across web channels and campaigns (web analytics, SEO, paid media, email)
Own the web analytics infrastructure: manage GA4, GTM, and consent management platforms
Lead web optimization and A/B testing initiatives to improve conversion and user engagement
Manage and evolve the global corporate website (CMS-based), coordinating with regional teams and IT
Develop and maintain dashboards (Power BI or equivalent) for marketing leadership reporting
culture_keywords: intersection of performance analytics and web experience
key interface between marketing, IT, and digital vendors
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI certification (PL-300) and dashboard-building experience prominently — directly maps to JD dashboard requirement
Emphasize A/B testing and experiment design from CV skills, linking to conversion optimization mindset
Showcase KPI framework design and multi-channel performance reporting across B2B contexts
Stress EMEA multi-market experience (GRG Banking, Hapag-Lloyd) to align with EMEA scope of the role
Frame funnel and conversion analysis experience as transferable to web analytics and CRO context
Mention Google Looker Studio as an adjacent analytics tool to bridge partial gap toward GA4 familiarity
Highlight B2B marketing background — Sysmex is a B2B medtech company and the JD explicitly lists this as preferred
raw_jd_text:
Are you looking for more than just a job, for something truly meaningful and rewarding? Then Sysmex Europe SE is the place for you. As the regional headquarters for the EMEA (Europe, Middle East and Africa) region, our company is dedicated to providing essential products that help people worldwide. We develop, produce, and distribute haematology instruments, reagents and informatics solutions for laboratory diagnostics globally. Join our team of 3,000 employees and make a difference every day.

Online Marketing Manager (f/m/x) – Web & Performance Focus. We're looking for a strategic and hands-on Online Marketing Manager who thrives at the intersection of performance analytics and web experience. In this role, you'll own our digital marketing performance data, lead web optimization initiatives, and serve as the key interface between marketing, IT, and our digital vendors.

Your key responsibilities:
- Monitor, analyze, and report on digital marketing performance across all web channels and campaigns (web analytics, SEO, paid media, email)
- Own the web analytics infrastructure: manage Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager (GTM), and consent management platforms
- Lead web optimization and A/B testing initiatives to improve conversion and user engagement
- Manage and evolve our global corporate website (CMS-based), coordinating with regional teams and IT
- Drive SEO strategy and implementation in collaboration with content and regional teams
- Manage agency relationships and vendor partnerships (performance, web, SEO)
- Define, track, and report on KPIs and digital benchmarks for EMEA and global digital channels
- Support campaign planning and execution with data insights and measurement frameworks
- Develop and maintain dashboards (Power BI or equivalent) for marketing leadership reporting
- Champion digital marketing best practices across the EMEA region

Your profile:
- 3–5 years of experience in digital/online marketing, with a strong focus on web analytics and performance measurement
- Hands-on expertise in GA4, Google Tag Manager (GTM), and SEO tools (e.g. SEMrush, Ahrefs)
- Experience managing a corporate website (preferably with a global/multi-regional scope)
- Strong analytical mindset — comfortable with data, dashboards, and deriving actionable insights
- Familiarity with CMS platforms (e.g., Sitecore, Adobe Experience Manager, or similar)
- Working knowledge of paid media channels (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, or similar)
- Excellent English skills (business fluent); German is a plus
- Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar BI tools is a strong plus
- B2B marketing environment experience preferred
